since_last: 56% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.33%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 56% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC -2.75% · Gold +0.95% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 56% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.33%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.33%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.35%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at +6.26%
cards.body: Leaders: KLAC +6.26%, LRCX +5.54%, AMAT +5.36%, AMBA +5.28%, TER +5.03%. Laggards: DDOG -4.52%, HON -1.97%, NOW -1.90%, SNOW -1.60%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.09% at $163.76
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.09% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
